analysis.reasoning: Core message: The tweet praises former Directors-General of the EU and endorses a quoted statement by Stefano Manservisi as 'Absolutely right. Calm and strong. A lesson.' It expresses approval of respected EU officials’ judgment and demeanor but provides no substantive claim about EU policies, unity, global role, or citizen benefits. Evaluation: EU1 (successful story): Implicitly positive about EU leadership quality, but it does not showcase EU history, overcoming obstacles, or learned lessons; too vague—reject. EU2 (united): No mention of unity or agreements—reject. EU3 (useful for citizens): No policy outcomes or citizen benefits—reject. EU4 (avant-garde actor): No pioneering policies mentioned—reject. EU5 (global champion of fair causes): No reference to human rights/democracy leadership—reject. EU6 (contributes to a better world): No mention of global contributions—reject. Conclusion: No listed narrative is explicitly promoted.
